posts.text: If the ceasefire holds, the most likely outcome is a wounded Iranian regime clinging to power and seeking maximal goals in talks. It has no navy or air force; it has lost and used up many of its missiles and drones. Its economy has been set back years https://www.economist.com/leaders/2026/04/09/donald-trump-is-the-wars-biggest-loser?taid=69d80c5550dfba0001004e33&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
BREAKING: The S&P 500 officially posts its longest win streak since October 2025, now up +8% since the March 30th low.

That's +$4.5 TRILLION in market cap in 8 trading days.

Asset owners are the only winners in this market.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: It took centuries of toil and sacrifice to reach the apex of human civilization that is America. The crux of the Democrat agenda is to resettle the masses of the world on our shores and redistribute the wealth and resources our civilization has produced until nothing is left.
posts.author: hkuppy
